---
title: "Eylul Isil Altiparmak - Hakkimda"
sidebar: Kisaca
---

![](assets/images/eia-vesikalik.png){fig-align="center"}

# Egitim

-   B.S., Food Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2018 - 2022.
-   M.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2026 - ongoing.

# Is Tecrubesi

## Employements

1.  Bahs., position Supply Chain Specialist, year 2025-2026

2.  Teaco & Bobaco, position Purchasing Specialist, year 2025

3.  Elite Naturel, position Business Development Specialist, year 2023-2024

4.  Patiswiss, position Project and Business Development Engineer, year 2022-2023

## Internships

1.  Firm Ulker, position Operational Excellence and Efficiency, year 2020

2.  Firm Ankara Halk Ekmek, position Food Engineer, year 2020

# Projects

1.  EU Goals - Peynir Alti Suyundan Saccharomyces cerevisiae S288 Susu Kullanilarak Tek Hucre Proteini Uretimi

# Publications

1.  Dasdemir, E., Batta, R., Koksalan, M., Tezcaner Ozturk, D. (2022) “UAV Routing for Reconnaissance Mission: A Multi-Objective Orienteering Problem with Time-Dependent Prizes and Multiple Connections”, Computers & Operations Research, 145: 105882.

# Competencies

Autocad, Matlab, Photoshop, R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies

- Paragliding
- Sailing
- Diving
- Theathre
- Photography
- Archery

Iletisim
- Email: eyllaltiparmak@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/eylulisilaltiparmak/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eylulaltiparmak/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Eylul-Isil-Altiparmak/
